title: Worker Permissions Policy
description: Defines allowed file classes, forbidden file classes, and human-required escalation triggers for each role-bounded AI worker class. Reference: docs/ai-native/backend-worker-layers.md, docs/ai-native/roles.md

docs.description: Produces and maintains documentation under docs/ and ops/. No runtime code.
humanEscalation: Proposes changes to shared docs outside docs/ or ops/
Needs to edit SOP.md or roles.md that affect other worker classes
Encounters links to files that no longer exist

tests.description: Writes and maintains test files under test/. May read source but not modify it.
humanEscalation: Test requires a change to source code to be testable
Test reveals a bug in source code that blocks the test
Needs to add a new test utility that requires a shared dependency

tooling.description: Maintains scripts, CI config, and developer tooling. No application source.
humanEscalation: Script requires a new npm dependency (package.json change)
CI config change affects merge protection rules
Tooling change would alter build output or validation behavior

runtime-feature.description: Implements business module code under src/<slice>/. Layer 4 in the worker layer model.
humanEscalation: Needs to modify Prisma schema or generated client
Requires a new NestJS module outside existing feature slices
Change affects authentication or authorization flows
Touches shared AppModule imports

runtime-foundation.description: Resolves runtime blockers: Prisma client bootstrap, DatabaseModule, RedisModule, core DI. Layer 2 in the worker layer model.
humanEscalation: Requires modifying prisma/schema.prisma
Requires changing package.json dependencies
Foundation change would break existing feature slices
Generated client needs regeneration

prisma.description: Manages Prisma schema changes and database migrations. May trigger generated client regeneration.
humanEscalation: Migration drops a column or table with existing data
Schema change affects more than one feature slice
Requires a data migration script
Migration is not reversible

review.description: Performs cross-cutting review, parity checks, security audit, and migration audit. Layer 5 in the worker layer model. Read-only.
humanEscalation: Review finds a security vulnerability that requires immediate source fix
Review discovers architectural violation that blocks merge
Review requires access to runtime logs or production data

merge.description: Handles merge queue management, release prep, and final integration validation. Layer 6 in the worker layer model.
humanEscalation: Merge conflict cannot be resolved automatically
Health gate fails and root cause is unclear
Release requires cherry-pick or branch management decision

state-reconciler.description: Manages AI-native control-plane state files (ai-state, wave tracking, task manifests).
humanEscalation: State file references a worker or task that no longer exists
Wave tracking is out of sync with actual merge history
State reconciliation requires deleting or overwriting a completed task record

provider-pool.description: Manages AI provider configuration, model routing, and fallback policies for worker dispatch.
humanEscalation: Adding a new AI provider or model to the pool
Changing fallback behavior that affects all workers
Modifying rate limits or cost thresholds

meta-loop.description: Orchestrates the self-cycle loop, wave planning, and batch scheduling. Top-level control-plane automation.
humanEscalation: Loop detects conflicting wave assignments
Batch scheduling requires overriding conflict group rules
Self-cycle enters a retry loop exceeding maxRetries
Wave planning requires splitting a task across multiple workers
